programme.title: Abandoned Fish Farms Turn Into Plastic Traps Underwater
programme.desc: Below the surface, collapsing fish farms turn nets and cages into deadly plastic traps. Divers reveal how risky and complex the cleanup really is.

programme.title: Under Taliban Control - Cricket Brings Hope To Divided Afghanistan
programme.desc: Afghanistan has become one of the world's top cricket nations, bringing hope to a country reeling from decades of crisis. The return of the Taliban means this development can only be celebrated by half the population - but Afghan women in exile are using cricket to resist. We join young players Jamal Stanikzai and Firooza Amiri, and national team player Gulbadin Naib, on a global cricket journey.

programme.title: E8 - Tree Tales
programme.desc: Trees are Africa’s oldest residents, and each has its own strategy for surviving the dry season. The sausage tree and the fig tree ride-out seasonal extremes, to provide food and shelter for struggling animals in the lean times. In return animals help these trees to reproduce by pollinating their flowers and dispersing their seed. African trees promote life, and form the backbone of one of Earths’ most precious ecosystems.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Winged Weirdos
programme.desc: One uses a mustache to attract mates and another has a bill so big, it needs special vertebrae to carry it. Learn how nature's flying iconoclasts have evolved their appearance in order to survive.

programme.title: E10 - Path of the Matriarch
programme.desc: In southern India, the summer is a challenge for Asian elephants who must drink every day. As things dry up, Anura, the matriarch, leads her herd to a distant watering hole. But will she succeed in getting her 3-month-old grandson there in time?

programme.title: E1 - Einstein Must Go!
programme.desc: Get to know the Waterfront Pride: males Tom Tom and Caller, 8 lionesses, 10 youths, and Einstein, the grown cub who never left home. Watch Einstein’s defiance catch up with him when rivals from the Outsiders Pride make a play that seals his fate.

programme.desc: On the agenda: the fight against drug trafficking in the Antilles; meeting the rescuers who intervene when avalanches strike; craftspeople facing competition from online commerce; a focus on the manufacturing of tiny houses in the Vosges...

programme.title: E6 - Sylvie Brassard, Kitesurfing Guide In Australia
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. programme.title: E4 - Lalique Crystal/Acapulco Paradiso Paris
programme.desc: Parisian walk around the Place des Vosges. Lalique revives the innovative spirit of Rene Lalique through a collection that enhances light and nature. Learn all about the origins of the marquise ring. The brand Acapulco Paradiso Paris, by Zoe du Puy-Montbrun, creates original outfits for dancers.

programme.title: E1 - Martelange
programme.desc: To kick off the 2025 season, Adrien Joveneau highlights the town of Martelange, located on the Luxembourg border, known for its slate mining past and its wooded landscapes. The musical guest for this stop is the band Suarez, accompanied by Antoine Donneaux.

programme.title: E3 - Unusual Museums
programme.desc: Among the two hundred museums in the city of Paris, some are more confidential than others and belong to brands, associations, or private collectors. Yvan Hallouin explores the most surprising of them.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Nobunaga presents the Fujito Stone-known as the “Stone of the Ruler”-to Yoshiaki. However, Yoshiaki has begun to realize that his vision for the future is drifting apart from Nobunaga's. Meanwhile, Tokichiro is appointed Kyoto Magistrate, and both he and Koichiro find themselves constantly pressed by their duties. One day, they accompany Nobunaga on a visit to Odani Castle, where Ichi lives with Azai Nagamasa. Although Ichi and Nagamasa appear to be living happily, Nagamasa's father Hisamasa (Enoki Takaaki), who harbors deep resentment toward the Oda, has begun acting in unsettling ways.

programme.title: E30 - Turtle Boy
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: E34 - The Sleeping Badge
programme.desc: Tag is having trouble sleeping, so Duggee offers him a few tricks to help him.

programme.title: E23 - Pear
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the fastest woodwind player - Pear!

programme.title: E9 - Digger
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'digger' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of diggers - a big digger, a small digger, a dumping digger and a really muddy digger!

programme.title: E25 - Messy Gets Clean
programme.desc: Messy travels with Zoe and Felix to the Okido launderette and learns just how much soap is too much.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E31 - Work
programme.desc: In a game of 'Work', Dad hires Bluey and Bingo at his drainpipe factory. But when Bluey takes charge, Dad finds his new boss pretty tough, especially her no dancing rule.

programme.title: E45 - TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: E46 - Slide
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: E16 - Gua Rusa, Borneo
programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch discovers his Halloween pumpkin isn't as big as the Grimbots' one, he goes in search of some fertilizer to help it grow.

programme.title: E6 - Tortoise Snooze
programme.desc: When it is time for Tortoise to hibernate, Sarah and Duck help him find a quiet place.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E16 - Phones
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: E16 - Lolly's Keys
programme.desc: Messy monster is having breakfast and sees little objects on the fridge. Why don't they fall off? He goes to OKIDO to find out!

programme.title: E12 - It's Time For Carnival
programme.desc: JoJo wants to celebrate the St Lucia carnival with Great Gran Gran, but it's too far away to travel to! Instead, JoJo and Gran Gran have their own carnival in the garden!

programme.title: E19 - The Claw
programme.desc: When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.title: E4 - The Spot The Difference Badge
programme.desc: Duggee looks different, but what is it? By playing some looking games, the Squirrels learn how best to spot the difference.

programme.title: E5 - Happy's First Day
programme.desc: Happy has always loved the water. But while swimming around in his paddling pool at the playhouse, Duggee reminds the Squirrels that there was a time when Happy feared water!

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E2 - Rhyming Lurgy
programme.desc: In this episode the new pirates Sandy and Seaweed have caught the rhyming lurgy of the Ancient Mariner and can only speak in rhyme!

programme.desc: Lily is looking after a big toy baby, but she needs Krash and He-He to babysit her a while

programme.desc: Alexis Pageau begins his journey into the world of backcountry skiing. Accompanied by former champion Thomas Rinfret, he explores the backcountry of the famous Charlevoix range.

programme.title: E26 - Bamboo Flowers
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: The best reports from ''Mise au Point'', the programme that takes a fresh look at national and international news events. Through its exclusive investigations and in-depth reports, ''Mise au Point'' tackles a wide range of topics: politics, economics, social issues, sports, culture and new trends.

programme.title: E5 - For The Prosecution
programme.desc: At the appeal court, assisted by Maxime, Jeanne defends a doctor accused of murder. On the opposite side, a heavyweight from the police force and against whom she holds an enduring grudge. Elodie is assaulted in the street. The prime suspect is none other than one of Nadia's clients.

programme.title: Un Soir... Un Train
programme.desc: Mathias, a linguistics professor at a Flemish university, is having an affair with Anne. When he has to travel far from home to give a lecture, Anne, to his great surprise, joins him on the train. But when he wakes up, the young woman has disappeared...

programme.title: E16 - Nadia Ounais (Tunisia)
programme.desc: Born in Tunisia, Nadia Ounais has been passionate about diving and oceanography since childhood. After a brilliant career in biology and oceanology, she takes over the direction of the Oceanographic Institute of Monaco. Deeply attached to her native country, she participated in the renovation of the Salammbo aquarium.

programme.desc: Host Julia Zemiro and expert criminologists Prof Danielle Reynald and Dr David Bartlett are joined by Claire Hooper and Nick Cody to explore the power of conformity and its role in crime.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, was caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him. She agrees to help, but only once her husband is out of the house.

programme.title: E15 - Cajun Chicken Confit With Pickled Fennel
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and “dirty pasta”.

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: The film chronicles Gaynor's rise to fame, from her humble beginnings to becoming one of the most iconic voices in music history. The biopic will also delve into the personal challenges Gaynor faced.

programme.title: E15 - Cajun Chicken Confit With Pickled Fennel
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and “dirty pasta”.

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: The film chronicles Gaynor's rise to fame, from her humble beginnings to becoming one of the most iconic voices in music history. The biopic will also delve into the personal challenges Gaynor faced.

programme.title: E63 - Dallas: Ivandell
programme.desc: Without Chauncey's knowledge, Derek purchases a zombie located in an historical conservation district, hindering the way these flippers are able to renovate the house.

programme.title: E1 - Destinations Impossible
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo introduces viewers to dining destinations deemed impossible - but also delicious! First up, a trip to Thailand to sip tea in a tree before jetting off to a restaurant balanced on a rock.

programme.title: E26 - Pesto 2.0
programme.desc: Rachael is known for her delicious and flavourful pesto sauces of all varieties. She prepares a pesto alla trapanese, a Sicilian dish made with almonds and tomatoes.

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: The film chronicles Gaynor's rise to fame, from her humble beginnings to becoming one of the most iconic voices in music history. The biopic will also delve into the personal challenges Gaynor faced.

programme.title: E1 - Destinations Impossible
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo introduces viewers to dining destinations deemed impossible - but also delicious! First up, a trip to Thailand to sip tea in a tree before jetting off to a restaurant balanced on a rock.

programme.title: E9 - Country Captain Chicken Stew
programme.desc: Chef Deborah makes country captain chicken stew, a flavourful Southern dish with an Indian influence, made with bone-in chicken, curry, tomatoes and coconut milk, served over rice noodles.

programme.title: E11 - Paella Macaroni
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece prepares a pasta version of paella, a traditional Spanish dish, and gives it a Southern mac-and-cheese twist.

Lighting the Solar System
programme.desc: What's the best way to remember the colours of the rainbow? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of light in space. Have hands-on fun by creating a kaleidoscope, and get to know Wang Zhenyi, who originated her own exact model of the solar system.

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: Mighty Muscles!
programme.desc: One of Britain's strongest women, Andrea Thompson, joins the Doctors in the lab as they reveal how muscle fibers work, and we welcome three more incredible Ouch! Award finalists.

programme.title: Mars or Bust
programme.desc: Can we really go to Mars? The team blasts off, and before you know it, they're exploring Mars while Fico and Oto go looking for the lander. But the two are stunned to see a space-suited Martian take the lander inside his house!

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: There have been a few occasions when spacecraft have been lost in space. Host Emily Calandrelli looks at several of these adventures. In some cases, the spacecraft that were lost, were remarkably found again.

programme.title: Mighty Muscles!
programme.desc: One of Britain's strongest women, Andrea Thompson, joins the Doctors in the lab as they reveal how muscle fibers work, and we welcome three more incredible Ouch! Award finalists.

programme.title: What Are Memories For
programme.desc: The Rhythmic squad is training hard for the competition. But a disaster strikes when one of the team gets injured. And things aren't going so well for trampoline gymnast Corey either.

programme.title: It's Gala Time!
programme.desc: As the ice skating season draws to a close, there is the annual event in the calendar that everyone is talking about. All the Ice Stars gather together for some sensational Hollywood-themed performances. For the Icicles, it's the last time they'll skate together.

programme.title: We Are Superheroes!
programme.desc: It's superhero time as the doctors' alter-egos go into battle to show the secret powers of your skin, which uses Vitamin D from the sun to make your bones strong! And Dr. Raph is on duty for incredible eye surgery.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Today, the Junior Vets meet some feisty meerkats who need their claws trimmed, but first, they've got to catch them. Ashanti, the elephant, gets his feet and tail cleaned. Johnny and Inel discover what you get when you cross a lion and a tiger.

programme.title: Rip Roaring Roller Coaster
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build their own roller-coaster and learn how trains stay on track and how you can loop the loop.

programme.title: Secret Message!
programme.desc: Eric learns that, with a little science, you can bring out all the colours that make up the black ink in felt tip markers. He separates the colours using chromatography. This gives him a way to write secret messages.

programme.title: Sensational Solubles!
programme.desc: Eric is not sure what soluble means. To find out, he makes a snow globe and compares things that are soluble in water with things that are not.

programme.title: Lighting the Solar System
programme.desc: What's the best way to remember the colours of the rainbow? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of light in space. Have hands-on fun by creating a kaleidoscope, and get to know Wang Zhenyi, who originated her own exact model of the solar system.

programme.title: Bucket
programme.desc: No place to sit? Do not worry, we have the most creative solution for you!

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 2: The Big Ones
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers continue their search for the Big Seven wild animals in Addo Elephant National Park in South Africa. They discover ancient rock art in caves and experience exciting moments with a large herd of elephants.

programme.title: Treasure of the Islanders
programme.desc: After Dolos has sold two maps to the same treasure, the pirates and the Nektons are racing to get to the treasure first!

programme.title: Reduce Screen Time
programme.desc: The Grimwades decide to reduce screen time by taking a screen break. With their devices stored away in a cardboard box, they go to a sensory garden and experience the here and now by using each of their five senses one by one.

programme.title: 28 Chores Later
programme.desc: When Max becomes obsessed with his new reality game that involves killing zombies while performing household tasks, Noodles takes the lead and pursues his own idea.

programme.title: Speedy Enzymes
programme.desc: The doctors reveal how enzymes speed up chemical reactions inside the body with a foam experiment, and Dr. Xand explores how the brain reacts to music. Meanwhile, Alfie has a sore hip, and Taya has stepped on broken glass.

programme.title: What Are Memories For
programme.desc: The Rhythmic squad is training hard for the competition. But a disaster strikes when one of the team gets injured. And things aren't going so well for trampoline gymnast Corey either.

programme.title: Neurons, Neurons, Neurons!
programme.desc: Eric learns that neurons are the brain's tiny building blocks. He does an experiment to show what they are and how they work. He is surprised to learn that giraffes have neurons that are five metres long.

programme.title: Eggy Teeth
programme.desc: In this episode, the doctors chew disclosing tablets to take a close look at their gnashers - who will have brushed their teeth the best?! And find out what happens to your teeth when you eat and drink with an eggs-cellent experiment!

programme.title: The Many Sides of Triangles
programme.desc: Eric tests the strength of a paper chair. Will it buckle under pressure or will it stand up to the test? Triangles are inherently strong because they form a fixed shape that's been used in architecture throughout the ages, but are they really the strongest shape ever?

programme.title: Wapiti's Wheely Good Waka
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts are preparing their waka for summer, but when Wapiti turns up in a wheelchair, they have to find a way to make the waka more accessible.

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: French Connections
programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: E117 - Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: E501 - Aj To The Rescue
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are racing through the jungle when Blaze gets trapped in super sticky mud! Now it's up to AJ and his new animal friends, to go on an epic adventure to save Blaze!

programme.title: E502 - The Trophy Chase
programme.desc: The Championship Race is about to start, and all the fastest trucks in town are ready to roll! But when Crusher steals the trophy before the race even begins, it's up to Blaze and his friends to get it back in time.

programme.title: E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E103 - Parents
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: E714 - Pickleworld!
programme.desc: It's Pickleworld! The coolest, most pickle-riffic theme park in ALL of Axle City. Too bad Pickle's family got lost on the way there! In their briniest adventure yet, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to rescue the family and bring them back to the park.

programme.title: E222 - The Crew Builds A Hotel / The Crew Builds A Hiking Trail
programme.desc: Builder Cove gets its first hotel when Farmer Zoe's cousin Hadley comes to visit. But will Hadley approve of the new hotel?// After a hiking trail mix-up confuses everyone going to Mr. Ducky-Doo's birthday party, the pups help them get back on track.

programme.title: E415 - Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig needs help when his boat sinks, so Granddad Dog gives them all a lift to Grampy Rabbit's Boatyard so that the boat can be fixed.

programme.title: E605 - The Aquarium
programme.desc: Goldie the Goldfish is feeling a little lonely, so Peppa takes her to the aquarium.

programme.title: E201 - Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the 'BAM'.

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E103 - Parents
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: E220 - The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E503 - The Island Of Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Somewhere, on The Island of Lost Treasure, there are incredible riches just waiting to be discovered. And Blaze and Darington are determined to be the first to find them!

programme.title: E837 - Grampy Rabbit's Jetpack
programme.desc: It's snowing and Grampy Rabbit has built a jetpack. While showing it to Peppa and George, he shoots off into the distance ending up on top of a snowy mountain. Miss Rabbit goes to rescue him, but Grampy Rabbit is the one that rescues them all.

programme.title: E101 - Lucky Croc / Sleepover Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. // When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E307 - Learning To Fly / Queen Swiper
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Dulce the Dragon learn to fly so she can reach her parents at Cloudy Caves. // After La Reina and Swiper's bodies were switched by Big Red Chicken's magic, Dora and Boots help them switch back!

programme.title: E424 - Paper Aeroplanes
programme.desc: Some of Daddy Pig's important work papers have gone missing – because Mummy Pig, Peppa and George have accidentally made them into paper airplanes.

programme.title: E425 - Edmond Elephant's Birthday
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go to help at Edmond Elephant's birthday party, but the little children are harder to look after than they expected.

programme.title: E117 - Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 本劇以患病少女何冉在生命最後階段學習生活、情感經歷與個人成長為線，講述她在遇到有著難以釋懷過往、幾乎對未來人生失去信心的傑出園藝家蕭寒後，兩人經過一系列誤打誤撞的、溫馨浪漫的奇妙際遇後，從彼此身上尋回各自生命中最重要卻曾經缺失的部分，重拾對生活的信心和希望，也收穫刻骨銘心愛情的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 《愛很美味》講述了三位個性迥異、特色鮮明的都市麗人，在經歷了一系列創業的艱辛，職場的壓迫，和感情的波折後，對生活、事業和愛情都有了重新的認識。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

E602 - Chum Goes To Hollywood
programme.desc: Rick aims to negotiate a football helmet signed by 28 Heisman winners. Chum travels to LA to iron out a deal for vintage garb. Will he be able to thread the needle, or will his trip be oh sew pointless?

programme.title: E13 - Everything In The Air All At Once
programme.desc: As the team conducts their most complex experiment ever at the Triangle, they are stunned as a number of bizarre events unfold before their eyes.

programme.title: E5 - Dodging Death
programme.desc: These stories take survival to the extreme. Like fending off a black bear while dangling off a cliff. Or drifting through shark-infested waters with nothing but a pair of rubber boots to stay afloat.

programme.title: E2 - Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Faced with skittish game and unfamiliar plants, the final group of survivalists quickly learn their earliest strategies will be met with unforgiving resistance.

programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos looks at mysterious teachers who have appeared throughout history and reveals The Top Ten Alien Influencers, who he believes provide the ultimate proof of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E6 - Fun Adventures & Sleepy Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - Sarah Gets Good News
programme.desc: After the success of her first restaurant in Goa, India, former Masterchef contestant Sarah Todd steps up to the challenge of opening a second restaurant, The Wine Rack in the heart of the urban metropolis, Mumbai.

programme.title: E2 - Kitchen Isn't Ready
programme.desc: Seeking inspiration for her menu, Sarah immerses herself in Mumbai’s thriving street food scene. Meanwhile delays on the new restaurant kitchen are putting the team behind schedule.

programme.title: E4 - Schooled by a Girl Scout
programme.desc: When a 13-year-old girl scout needs help earning a primitive camping skills badge, Bear Grylls flies to the rescue… literally. Beth’s wisdom for life and the outdoors is beyond her years, but nothing can prepare her for what challenges bear has in store for this adventure.

programme.title: E7 - Dogfight
programme.desc: Mikey shows a veteran Buffalo’s DC-3, WZS, Buffalo’s very own vintage plane from the Second World War. It is being fitted with a special ‘static’ line, which paratroopers will clip onto for a D- Day reenactment jump. But army inspectors tell Mikey a modern military needs a modern line with a winch system in case they need to retrieve a “hung-up jumper”. Cory and Mikey scramble to build the retrieval line before the inspector comes back to test it. But with their bumbling and fumbling, it doesn’t look like they will make the cut. Meanwhile, Chris Staples and some of Buffalo’s pilots head down to Fullerton, California, to Air Combat USA, where pilots get to experience aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. The pilots do yo-yos, spins and pull Gs to out-maneuver their opponent. First up in the dogfights are newly checked-out co-pilot Sam Storm versus longtime co-pilot David Alexandre. Sam wins the fight due to David’s inability to hold down his breakfast. Next up is cocky co-pilot Chris

programme.title: E4 - Hot Rods and Speed Boats
programme.desc: The King Of The North drag race kicks off with Billy scrambling to prepare his hotrod for its race against Chris and the Jet Truck, in a challenge that will see the loser facing public humiliation.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Jess visits the East Foundation in South Texas to participate in a fast-paced, yet careful and methodical deer capture.

programme.title: Wild Costa Rica
programme.desc: Explore the incredible creatures that inhabit Costa Rica, one of the most ecologically diverse places on earth. Meet the rare and secretive ocelot and puma, and much more.

programme.title: Grand Maison Paris
programme.desc: After their restaurant 'Grand Maison Tokyo' earned a Michelin three-star, Natsuki Obana and Rinko Hayami venture to Paris to open 'Grand Maison Paris,' aiming to become the first Asian chefs to achieve the same honor. However, they face cultural challenges and intense pressure in a city filled with culinary masters. Following a mishap at a gala dinner, Obana makes a pact with his former mentor: he will leave France if they don't earn three stars in the next Michelin evaluation. Can Obana and his team overcome these obstacles to achieve their dream?

programme.title: Exclusive Premiere: My Daughter is a Zombie
programme.desc: Jung-hwan, a professional wild animal trainer, spends his days bickering and playing with his teenage daughter, Soo-ah, who is passionate about dancing. Then one day, Soo-ah gets infected by a zombie virus that sweeps across the world. To protect her, Jung-hwan takes Soo-ah to Eunbong-ri, a seaside village where his mother, Bam-soon, lives. In a society determined to root out the infected, Jung-hwan notices that Soo-ah still seems to understand words, responds to her favorite songs and dances, and even flinches when scolded by Grandma Bam-soon's back scratching stick. Refusing to give up on his daughter, Jung-hwan calls on his years of animal training experience and begins the top-secret mission of training his zombie daughter...

programme.title: Love Scam, Actually
programme.desc: is a 2026 documentary that delves into the story of Filipino sports news anchor Migs Bustos and how his image was used by online scammers to con women into falling in love - and then paying the price. Journalist Lyza Aquino follows Bustos as he fights back to clear his name and take back his own image. The documentary features interviews with women across Southeast Asia who thought they found love online. But instead, they found extortion and a vast network of “romance scams”.

programme.title: E8 - 杜德偉驚喜加盟再唱《情人》
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E8 - 胡夏以歌傳情
programme.desc: 蘇有朋、薛之謙、王嘉爾、周筆暢、胡彥斌、歐陽娜娜等明星作為音浪召集人，他們將與300位合夥人組成3組音浪團，在24小時內緊急排練，一起完成創意十足的音樂SHOW。

programme.title: E16 - 心動告白
programme.desc: 以山野為背景，10位素人嘉賓都攜帶一個秘密進入「真相小屋」，這些秘密可能涉及過去的傷痛、未了的心願等，隨著節目推進逐漸揭曉；秘密成為推動他們情感發展的關鍵因素，也增加了未知性和驚喜感，並放棄了傳統戀綜依賴觀察室嘉賓或專家解析的模式，讓觀眾直接充當觀察者。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 以美食公司為背景，通過王大蔚等七名角色的職場成長線與三對CP的情感線，展現年輕人工作與生活的酸甜苦辣；劇情採用「貪吃蛇」結構來觀眾展現了7名主角的內心世界，搭配美食隱喻與事件反轉，展現角色互幫互助完成大型直播活動的過程。

programme.title: E8 - 周筆暢「孤獨音樂家」唱出共鳴
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 以美食公司為背景，通過王大蔚等七名角色的職場成長線與三對CP的情感線，展現年輕人工作與生活的酸甜苦辣；劇情採用「貪吃蛇」結構來觀眾展現了7名主角的內心世界，搭配美食隱喻與事件反轉，展現角色互幫互助完成大型直播活動的過程。

programme.title: E21 - 年度盛典 (上)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

programme.title: E16 - 心動告白
programme.desc: 以山野為背景，10位素人嘉賓都攜帶一個秘密進入「真相小屋」，這些秘密可能涉及過去的傷痛、未了的心願等，隨著節目推進逐漸揭曉；秘密成為推動他們情感發展的關鍵因素，也增加了未知性和驚喜感，並放棄了傳統戀綜依賴觀察室嘉賓或專家解析的模式，讓觀眾直接充當觀察者。

The Best Of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E120
programme.desc: Marie's turbulent journey to find her father leads to the birth of an eccentric new family, one that proves stronger than blood and more persistent than DNA.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.
